nasb.text: It was carved with cherubim and palm trees; and a palm tree was between cherub and cherub, and every cherub had two faces,

esv.text: It was carved of cherubim and palm trees, a palm tree between cherub and cherub. Every cherub had two faces:

cnv.text: 都刻上基路伯和棕樹。基路伯和棕樹相間並排，每個基路伯都有兩個臉孔。

ccb.text: 木板上刻着基路伯天使和棕树，两者彼此相间排列。基路伯天使有两个面孔：
